info.name: A to Z Accessories - Offers
info.description:
Full CRUD (+ toggle) endpoints for the Offers resource (admin only), covering all 7 offer types.

Base path: /admin/offers
Auth: Bearer token (Admin role required).

Offer types:
- buy_x_get_cheapest_free
- spend_x_get_discount
- spend_x_get_free_shipping
- buy_x_get_free_shipping
- buy_x_get_half_price
- spend_x_get_free_item
- flash_sale

Notes:
- The request body only carries image.mediaUrl; the server derives image.mediaKey by stripping the S3 base URL (https://atozaccessories.s3.amazonaws.com/).
- targetProducts / targetCategories / condition.excludedCategories are arrays of MongoDB ObjectIds.
- flash_sale is time-bounded: timing.startDate and timing.endDate are required, and lifecycle jobs are scheduled automatically.

Set the collection/environment variables:
- baseUrl: e.g. http://localhost:3000
- token: a valid admin JWT access token

query.description: Optional. One of the 7 offer types.
